summary: Motor de Cálculo Fiscal Inteligente - ALL 5 FEATURES VERIFIED AND WORKING. Tested: (1) NCF selector in Sale Types dialog, (2) NCF badge B02 in Sale Types list, (3) Para Llevar removes propina 10%, (4) Comer Aquí shows propina 10%, (5) Total recalculates correctly on service type change.
passed_tests: TEST 1: NCF selector appears in Sale Types edit dialog - PASS (data-testid='saletype-ncf-select' found with value 'B02')
TEST 2: NCF badge (B02) displayed in Sale Types list - PASS (B02 badge visible on AQUI, LLEVAR, Delivery entries)
TEST 3: Para Llevar removes propina 10% - PASS (message '*Propina omitida (solo aplica en local)' displayed)
TEST 4: Comer Aquí / Local shows propina 10% - PASS (LEY 10% = RD$ 19.53 shown in tax breakdown)
TEST 5: Total changes correctly when service type changes - PASS (Local: RD$ 250.00 → Llevar: RD$ 230.47)
critical_code_review_comments: Motor de cálculo inteligente correctly implements the intersection rule: tax applies only if Sale Type allows AND Product allows
is_dine_in_only flag on LEY tax correctly filters propina for non-dine-in service types
NCF type selector properly saved to sale_types collection with default_ncf_type_id field
Service type toggle (Local/Llevar/Delivery) updates currentSaleType state correctly
Tax breakdown dynamically recalculates when serviceType changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Motor de cálculo fiscal inteligente fully functional. Sale Types have default_ncf_type_id field (B02 = Factura de Consumo). The LEY tax (propina 10%) has is_dine_in_only=true flag which correctly hides it when service type is 'takeaway' or 'delivery'. Message '*Propina omitida (solo aplica en local)' displays when propina is excluded.

features_verified.ncf_selector_in_dialog: PASS - Dropdown selector 'NCF por Defecto' showing 'B02 - Factura de Consumo'
features_verified.ncf_badge_in_list: PASS - Blue badge with 'B02 (Factura)' on each sale type row
features_verified.para_llevar_removes_propina: PASS - Message shown and LEY (10%) removed from calculation
features_verified.comer_aqui_shows_propina: PASS - LEY (10%) = RD$ 19.53 included in tax breakdown
features_verified.total_recalculates_correctly: PASS - Local: RD$ 250.00 vs Llevar: RD$ 230.47 (difference = RD$ 19.53 propina)
